Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
Defendant Erica Monasterio'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Award Of Attorney'S Fees. IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)

Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ERICA MONASTERIO'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS AND FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES.
Appearances: Michelle L. McGill (334.8080) for defendant and moving party; Tasha Bollinger appearing telephonically on behalf of plaintiff.
Discussed and the court ruled as follows: continued to January 18, 2012 for plaintiff to file a notice of withdrawal of Lis Pendens. The court grants attorneys fees of $500 to be paid by January 18, 2012. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
